title: Liar Game: The Final Stage
original_title: ライアーゲーム　ザ・ファイナルステージ
overview: In Liar game: Final Stage, Players are encouraged to trust each other to win the tournament. However, a mysterious player named X is secretly plotting to sabotage everyone of their chances to win the LGT.
